full_text:
Zuo Guan 左悺
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zuo Guan (左悺)was born in Pingyang county, Henan commandery. An eunuch for Emperor Huan. Zuo Guan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
